scores.correctness_notes: Correctly identifies CertificateAvailableEvent but omits CertificateDeniedEvent entirely. The 'when to request' coverage differs from the gold standard (misses revocation and request_errors scenarios; focuses on refresh_events and automatic renewal instead). The response targets v4 of the library, not v1 as in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — TLSCertificatesRequiresV4, CertificateRequestAttributes, renewal_relative_time, refresh_events, renew_certificate(), and get_assigned_certificates() are all legitimate v4 API features.
